exercises.sentence: Todos los días, yo ___ un paseo por el parque con mi perro.
exercises.translation: Every day, I take a walk through the park with my dog.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ gracias a mis amigos por su ayuda constante.
exercises.translation: I give thanks to my friends for their constant help.

exercises.sentence: A veces, yo ___ mi opinión sobre los temas políticos.
exercises.translation: Sometimes, I give my opinion on political topics.

exercises.sentence: ¿Por qué ___ tú tantas explicaciones a esa persona?
exercises.translation: Why do you give so many explanations to that person?

exercises.sentence: Tú ___ un regalo especial a tu madre por su cumpleaños.
exercises.translation: You give a special gift to your mother for her birthday.

exercises.sentence: Si ___ tú todo tu esfuerzo, obtendrás buenos resultados.
exercises.translation: If you give all your effort, you will get good results.

exercises.sentence: Mi abuelo siempre me ___ buenos consejos sobre la vida.
exercises.translation: My grandfather always gives me good advice about life.

exercises.sentence: Ella ___ una fiesta grande para celebrar su graduación.
exercises.translation: She is throwing a big party to celebrate her graduation.

exercises.sentence: Usted ___ una impresión muy profesional en la entrevista.
exercises.translation: You give a very professional impression in the interview.

exercises.sentence: Ayer, yo ___ mi número de teléfono al cliente nuevo.
exercises.translation: Yesterday, I gave my phone number to the new client.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ el primer paso para solucionar el problema.
exercises.translation: I took the first step to solve the problem.

exercises.sentence: La semana pasada, yo ___ una vuelta completa a la manzana.
exercises.translation: Last week, I took a complete walk around the block.

exercises.sentence: ¿Por qué ___ tú esa respuesta tan grosera ayer?
exercises.translation: Why did you give that rude answer yesterday?

exercises.sentence: Tú ___ un abrazo fuerte a tu hermano antes de viajar.
exercises.translation: You gave a big hug to your brother before traveling.

exercises.sentence: Tú ___ el informe al jefe justo a tiempo.
exercises.translation: You gave the report to the boss right on time.

exercises.sentence: Él ___ dinero a la organización benéfica el mes pasado.
exercises.translation: He gave money to the charity organization last month.

exercises.sentence: Ella ___ un discurso increíble en la ceremonia escolar.
exercises.translation: She gave an incredible speech at the school ceremony.

exercises.sentence: Usted ___ una clase magistral sobre historia ayer.
exercises.translation: You gave a masterclass on history yesterday.

exercises.sentence: Cuando era niño, yo ___ de comer a los patos del estanque.
exercises.translation: When I was a child, I used to feed the ducks in the pond.

exercises.sentence: Antes, yo ___ clases de piano todos los sábados.
exercises.translation: Before, I used to give piano lessons every Saturday.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ muchos regalos a mis amigos cuando tenía dinero.
exercises.translation: I used to give many gifts to my friends when I had money.

exercises.sentence: Tú ___ saltos de alegría cada vez que veías a tu perro.
exercises.translation: You used to jump for joy every time you saw your dog.

exercises.sentence: Tú ___ información falsa a tus compañeros a propósito.
exercises.translation: You used to give false information to your classmates on purpose.

exercises.sentence: ¿Por qué ___ tú tantas vueltas antes de decidirte?
exercises.translation: Why did you used to pace around so much before deciding?

exercises.sentence: Él ___ siempre una vuelta en coche después de cenar.
exercises.translation: He always used to go for a drive after dinner.

exercises.sentence: Ella ___ mucha importancia a las tradiciones familiares.
exercises.translation: She used to place a lot of importance on family traditions.

exercises.sentence: Usted ___ una impresión muy amable a todos sus empleados.
exercises.translation: You used to give a very kind impression to all your employees.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ todo mi dinero si pudiera ayudar a los pobres.
exercises.translation: I would give all my money if I could help the poor.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ una respuesta clara si supiera toda la verdad.
exercises.translation: I would give a clear answer if I knew the whole truth.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ mi vida por proteger a mi familia.
exercises.translation: I would give my life to protect my family.

exercises.sentence: ¿Qué ___ tú a cambio de un deseo cumplido?
exercises.translation: What would you give in exchange for a fulfilled wish?

exercises.sentence: Tú ___ una mejor imagen si te vistieras formalmente.
exercises.translation: You would give a better image if you dressed formally.

exercises.sentence: ¿___ tú otra oportunidad a esa persona después de todo?
exercises.translation: Would you give that person another chance after everything?

exercises.sentence: Él ___ un premio al mejor estudiante de la clase.
exercises.translation: He would give a prize to the best student in the class.

exercises.sentence: Ella ___ su opinión si alguien se la pidiera.
exercises.translation: She would give her opinion if someone asked her for it.

exercises.sentence: Usted ___ una charla muy interesante sobre este tema.
exercises.translation: You would give a very interesting talk on this topic.

exercises.sentence: Mañana, yo ___ el examen final de la universidad.
exercises.translation: Tomorrow, I will take the final university exam.

exercises.sentence: Yo te ___ una noticia muy importante cuando te vea.
exercises.translation: I will give you some very important news when I see you.

exercises.sentence: Después del trabajo, yo ___ una vuelta por el centro.
exercises.translation: After work, I will take a walk through the center.

exercises.sentence: Tú ___ el primer discurso en la conferencia.
exercises.translation: You will give the first speech at the conference.

exercises.sentence: ¿___ tú el regalo a tu hermana este fin de semana?
exercises.translation: Will you give the gift to your sister this weekend?

exercises.sentence: Tú ___ una buena impresión en tu nueva oficina.
exercises.translation: You will give a good impression in your new office.

exercises.sentence: Él ___ su opinión en la reunión de la próxima semana.
exercises.translation: He will give his opinion in the meeting next week.

exercises.sentence: Ella ___ una fiesta inolvidable para su aniversario.
exercises.translation: She will throw an unforgettable party for her anniversary.

exercises.sentence: Usted ___ una clase sobre el uso correcto del lenguaje.
exercises.translation: You will give a class on the correct use of the language.
